title: Introducing the Observatory Library for End-to-End Table Embedding Inference
Observatory: Characterizing Embeddings of Relational Tables
WarpGate: A Prototype System for Semantic Join Discovery over Cloud Data Warehouses
Pylon: Semantic Table Union Search in Data Lakes
Can Attention Masks Improve Adversarial Robustness?

content: [11/03/23] Nominated by the CSE division for the Two Sigma PhD Fellowships (2023-2024 Cycle). [10/28/23] Our short paper on Observatory Library accepted to the NeurIPS TRL workshop. [01/10/23] Presented WarpGate at the Mövenpick hotel on the waterfront of the Amsterdam city center. [10/28/22] Our paper WarpGate accepted to CIDR 2023. [05/31/22] Passed the PhD preliminary exam and the candidacy qualification. [05/23/22] Started my research internship at Sigma Computing. Many thanks to Madelon Hulsebos for connecting me to this opportunity. [04/22/22] Awarded Rackham Doctoral Intern Fellowship. [04/15/21] Elected to the Beta Epsilon Chapter of Eta Kappa Nu ( HKN). [08/31/20] Started my PhD at UM.
